channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Judge delays order in antitrust case requiring Google to open up its app store
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — A federal judge on Friday delayed an order requiring Google to open up its Android app store to more competition until an appeals court decides whether to block the shake-up because of legal questions surrounding a jury's verdict that branded Google as an illegal monopolist.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL LIEDTKE, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Samsung Postpones Deliveries of ASML Equipment as Project Hits Roadblock
item.description: Samsung Electronics has postponed taking deliveries of ASML chipmaking equipment for its upcoming factory in Texas due to lack of major customers, sparking concerns about the project's future.
item.dc:creator: Reuters, Fast Company

item.title: Ferrari unveils its F1-inspired F80 hybrid supercar – the most powerful Ferrari to roll out of Maranello
item.description: Ferrari's F80 moves the game on from the LaFerrari it effectively replaces with more power and more advanced, race-derived technology.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Probe launched into Tesla’s ‘Full Self-Driving’ system after pedestrian killed in low visibility conditions
item.description: The National Highway Traffic Safety Administration says in documents that it opened the probe on Thursday after the company reported four crashes when Teslas encountered sun glare, fog and airborne dust.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, The Mercury News

item.title: Trump family will get 75% of crypto token revenue
item.description: The Trump family's cryptocurrency platform, World Liberty Financial, indicated in a report released Thursday that DT Marks DEFI LLC, a Delaware-based company connected to the former president, could get 75 percent of WLF's protocol revenues.
item.dc:creator: Juliann Ventura, NewsNation

item.title: Augmented reality screens are a feature, not a product
item.description: Apple released a claustrophobic submarine movie for Apple Vision Pro earlier this month, and it gave me a sinking feeling. The movie Submerged was neither augmented reality (AR) nor virtual reality (VR) nor 360-degree video. It was more like 180-degree video.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Apple Pay made wallets digital, and it’s only the beginning
item.description: Apple turned your iPhone into your wallet one decade ago. Ten years on, and the company continues to extend the digitization of personal payments, with small-scale loans, car rentals, and everything else that used to occupy space in your pocket.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: The Menendez brothers’ house is all over TikTok following the hit Netflix drama
item.description: With the recent release of the Netflix drama Monsters: The Lyle and Erik Menendez Story and the follow-up documentary The Menendez Brothers, true-crime enthusiasts are now turning their attention to the Beverly Hills mansion where it all went down.
item.dc:creator: Eve Upton-Clark, Fast Company

item.title: Anthropic CEO Dario Amodei pens a smart look at our AI future
item.description: Welcome to AI Decoded, Fast Company’s weekly newsletter that breaks down the most important news in the world of AI. You can sign up to receive this newsletter every week here.
item.dc:creator: Mark Sullivan, Fast Company

item.title: Trump family will get 75 percent of crypto token revenue
item.description: The Trump family's cryptocurrency platform, World Liberty Financial, indicated in a report released Thursday that DT Marks DEFI LLC, a Delaware-based company connected to the former president, could get 75 percent of WLF's protocol revenues.
item.dc:creator: Juliann Ventura, The Hill

item.title: Alabama man arrested in SEC social media account hack that led the price of bitcoin to spike
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — An Alabama man was arrested Thursday for his alleged role in the January hack of a U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission social media account that led the price of bitcoin to spike, the Justice Department said. Eric Council Jr.
item.dc:creator: ALANNA DURKIN RICHER, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Dominion voting systems is still a GOP bogeyman ahead of the election
item.description: The election is nearly here, and Dominion Voting Systems is once again on Republicans’ minds. The voting machine-maker became the subject of conspiracy theories following the 2020 election, which Donald Trump falsely claims was rigged against him.
item.dc:creator: Chris Stokel-Walker, Fast Company

item.title: One Direction was the internet's first boy band, and Liam Payne its grounding force
item.description: One Direction member Liam Payne was found dead this week after falling from a hotel balcony in Buenos Aires, Argentina, at just 31.
item.dc:creator: Maria Sherman, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Netflix's subscriber growth is slowing, but its profit and stock price are still surging
item.description: Netflix says its subscriber growth slowed dramatically during the summer, a sign that the huge gains from the video-streaming service’s crackdown on freeloading viewers is tapering off.
item.dc:creator: Michael Liedtke, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Scientists show how sperm and egg come together like a key in a lock
item.description: Scientists have pinpointed how sperm and egg fuse together across the animal kingdom, from fish to people.
item.dc:creator: Laura Ungar, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: How you can help protect your aging parents from scammers
item.description: "They were raised to be a very trusting generation, a very rule following generation, so they make the assumption that everyone has their best interest at heart," Paula Daigle said.
item.dc:creator: Hayley Wielgus, NewsNation

item.title: Gluware expands network automation platform with AI copilots, GitHub integration
item.description: Gluware today announced a series of upcoming features for its network automation platform, designed to streamline network management and reduce downtime across diverse network environments.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Hit the lights: Mets outfit Citi Field for electric light shows
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — The Mets are lighting up Citi Field, even before their batters step up to the plate. About 70 front-office staffers scattered around the ballpark for over five hours to install 3,500 strips of LED lights on each railing ahead of New York's first home postseason game.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Microsoft 365: A guide to the updates
item.description: Microsoft 365 (and Office 365) subscribers get more frequent software updates than those who have purchased Office without a subscription, which means subscribers have access to the latest features, security patches, and bug fixes.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: US agency adopts rule to make it easier for consumers to cancel unwanted subscriptions
item.description: The Federal Trade Commission adopted a final rule Wednesday that will require businesses to make it easy for consumers to cancel unwanted subscriptions and memberships.
item.dc:creator: HALELUYA HADERO, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Feds seeks more guidance on post-quantum cryptography transition
item.description: Federal cyber experts say they need more formal guidance and a range of other tools for a post-quantum cryptography effort that's expected to cost billions. The post Feds seeks more guidance on post-quantum cryptography transition first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Justin Doubleday, Federal News Network

item.title: Endpoint proliferation exacerbates old cybersecurity problem: data integration
item.description: Newer technologies like automation and AI may offer new solutions to this age-old cybersecurity problem, but they can also be double-edged swords. The post Endpoint proliferation exacerbates old cybersecurity problem: data integration first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Daisy Thornton, Federal News Network

item.title: AI isn’t really that smart yet, Apple researchers warn
item.description: While we wait for the Age Of Apple Intelligence, it may be worth considering a recent Apple research study that exposes critical weaknesses in existing artificial intelligence models.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Cisco pumps up data center networking with AI, large workloads in mind
item.description: Cisco is boosting network density support for its data center switch and router portfolio as it works to deliver the network infrastructure its customers need for cloud architecture, AI workloads and high-performance computing.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: AI-powered scam targets 2.5 billion Gmail users in sophisticated phishing attacks
item.description: Tech expert Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson talks about a new AI-powered scam that targets Gmail users and is harder to detect unless you're very cautious.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Lyft launches voter transportation initiative
item.description: Ride-hailing service Lyft announced it will offer discounted rides, bikeshare and scooters on Election Day, an initiative designed to increase transportation access for voters, according to a press release.
item.dc:creator: Juliann Ventura, The Hill

item.title: How Microsoft became a Big Tech choirboy
item.description: The US Federal Trade Commission (FTC) and the Department of Justice have aggressively targeted Big Tech, suing Meta, Google, Amazon, and Apple for antitrust violations. And it’s not doing so in a small way — it’s filed multiple law suits against Google, for example.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Microsoft settles video gamers' lawsuit over Activision takeover
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — Microsoft Corp. has settled a lawsuit from a group of gamers who sued to try to stop the company from buying video game publisher Activision Blizzard for $69 billion last year. Terms of the settlement were not disclosed.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Mexico says foreign firms have pledged $20 billion in investments, but many are old or uncertain
item.description: MEXICO CITY (AP) — Mexican officials announced Tuesday what they claimed was $20 billion in new foreign direct investment in Mexico, but much of that was neither new, nor completely certain.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Countries that have cashed in on their top-level domain names
item.description: LONDON (AP) — Anguilla is raking in extra revenue from registration fees for its .ai web domain thanks to the artificial intelligence boom, but it's not the only place cashing in on demand for websites with distinctive address endings.
item.dc:creator: KELVIN CHAN, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Voter beware: Text scam targets you, no matter where you live
item.description: Reports warn of a scam text falsely claiming that recipients aren’t registered to vote. Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson reveals what you need to know and five tips to avoid such schemes.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Murder trial of Nima Momeni in death of Cash App founder Bob Lee begins
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — The murder trial of a tech consultant in the stabbing death of Cash App founder Bob Lee begins Monday, a year and a half after the widely admired entrepreneur was found staggering on a deserted downtown San Francisco street seeking help.
item.dc:creator: JANIE HAR, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: How to leverage APIs for IT-enabled information capability
item.description: In today’s rapidly evolving digital landscape, businesses face constant pressure to adapt or risk being left behind. The strategic use of IT-enabled information management capability (IMC) is no longer just an advantage — it’s a necessity.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Volunteers bring solar power to Hurricane Helene's disaster zone
item.description: BAKERSVILLE, N.C. (AP) — Nearly two weeks after Hurricane Helene downed power lines and washed out roads all over North Carolina's mountains, the constant din of a gas-powered generator is getting to be too much for Bobby Renfro.
item.dc:creator: GABRIELA AOUN ANGUEIRA, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Top 5 methods to equip your car with Wi-Fi
item.description: Having Wi-Fi has become a necessity for many of us. Kurt "CyberGuy" Knutsson explores the top five ways to equip your vehicles with Wi-Fi.
item.dc:creator: Fox News
